items.title: Watch: Dramatic visuals of high-speed car chase in California
items.summary: A high-speed police chase through Southern California on Wednesday (April 8) ended when sheriff’s deputies deployed a “grappler” device, sending the vehicle crashing into a home in Jurupa Valley, local media reported. The suspect was pronounced dead at the crash scene, according to ABC affiliate KABC.
